name: Campers Pizza Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Using the pie iron, take two slices of bread.
2. Place 1 1/2 tablespoons of pizza sauce on one slice of bread.
3. Top with Mozzarella cheese and sliced pepperoni.
4. Place the other side of bread on top and butter the outer sides of the bread.
5. Put the sandwich into the pie iron and place in coals of fire.
6. Cook until the bread is toasted.
